nasb.text: Moreover, I will bring on you The one who takes possession, O inhabitant of Mareshah. The glory of Israel will enter Adullam.

esv.text: I will again bring a conqueror to you, inhabitants of Mareshah; the glory of Israel shall come to Adullam.

cnv.text: 瑪利沙的居民哪！ 我要再使那征服你的來到你那裡； 以色列的榮耀，必去到亞杜蘭。

ccb.text: 玛利沙的居民啊， 我要使征服者到你们那里。 以色列的领袖要躲到亚杜兰。
